properties.description: Four auth patterns across 94 API routes: 51 W+WEH, 37 W-only, 3 GA, 1 WEH-only, 2 no-auth
AI generation flow: POST /api/generate/[id] → emits generation:started → generates → emits generation:done → enqueues 7 background jobs
Wiki WRITE flow: PUT /api/wiki/[...slug] → lockFile → saveRevision (deprecated) → writeWikiPage (conflict check) → createSnapshotFile → recordVersion → generateIndex → unlockFile
Wiki QUERY flow: POST /api/wiki/query → parseWikiIndex → scoreWikiEntry → readWikiPage (top N) → buildSynthesisPrompt → Ollama generateText → extractCitations

Session SSE stream lifecycle: CONNECT → AUTH → RATE LIMIT → ACCESS CHECK → CAPACITY CHECK → REPLAY (Last-Event-ID) → SEND connected → SUBSCRIBE to 14 event types → HEARTBEAT (30s) → CLEANUP (on abort)

Central FK reference graph: users is most-referenced parent (27 child columns). sessions, universes, messages, relationships are also major parents. token_denylist and message_edits have no incoming FKs.

Two coexisting versioning systems: deprecated revisions.ts (file-based .revisions/) runs alongside canonical history.ts (DB wiki_versions + .snapshots/) during every write operation. Two logging systems: deprecated logger.ts (file-based) alongside history.ts.

4-tier idle processing hierarchy: T1 (5min) lightweight, T2 (10min) enrichment, T3 (15min) lore, T4 (30min) expensive. queueIdleJobs adds extract_lore_comprehensive, wiki_enrich_entity, wiki_generate_rumors, wiki_deepen_page alongside tier jobs.

External consumers of wiki subsystem: retrieval.ts (getWikiContext), entity-resolution.ts (resolveEntityToWikiPage), wiki-handler.ts (8 job types), lore-extraction.ts (comprehensive extraction). All depend on file-io.ts and wiki-root.ts.

Job lifecycle: queued → processing → completed/failed. Auto-retry: failed → queued (if retry_count < max_retries). Stale recovery: processing >5min → failed. Dedup: 30s window. Debounce: 30-60s per type. Retention: 30 days. Exponential backoff: min(base*2^retry, 30s).

Component composition: ChatWindow contains StreamingText and EditHistory. SessionRecapPanel and LoreExtractionTrigger both contain JobProgress. StreamingText and JobProgress both use useRenderLoop. LayerManager contains EraEditor, FactionEditor, CharacterEditor — all use ConfirmationDialog.
Complete authentication flow: login, verify session, logout
Full session lifecycle: create universe, create session, list, view details, subscribe to SSE
Core roleplay flow: subscribe to SSE, send message, generate AI response, list conversation
Wiki CRUD operations with conflict detection
Wiki status transitions and extended operations: validate, lock, reject, query with LLM, get graph data
Full job queue management: queue, list, process, cancel, retry, subscribe to progress SSE
Complete wiki subsystem: 14 library files for logic + 5 viewer components for UI
Complete migration from legacy lore DB to wiki system with rollback capability
Cross-cutting concerns: authentication required for every protected endpoint, consistent error format across all APIs

properties.description: Four auth patterns across 94 API routes: 51 W+WEH, 37 W-only, 3 GA, 1 WEH-only, 2 no-auth
AI generation flow: POST /api/generate/[id] → emits generation:started → generates → emits generation:done → enqueues 7 background jobs
Wiki WRITE flow: PUT /api/wiki/[...slug] → lockFile → saveRevision (deprecated) → writeWikiPage (conflict check) → createSnapshotFile → recordVersion → generateIndex → unlockFile
Wiki QUERY flow: POST /api/wiki/query → parseWikiIndex → scoreWikiEntry → readWikiPage (top N) → buildSynthesisPrompt → Ollama generateText → extractCitations

Session SSE stream lifecycle: CONNECT → AUTH → RATE LIMIT → ACCESS CHECK → CAPACITY CHECK → REPLAY (Last-Event-ID) → SEND connected → SUBSCRIBE to 14 event types → HEARTBEAT (30s) → CLEANUP (on abort)

Central FK reference graph: users is most-referenced parent (27 child columns). sessions, universes, messages, relationships are also major parents. token_denylist and message_edits have no incoming FKs.

Two coexisting versioning systems: deprecated revisions.ts (file-based .revisions/) runs alongside canonical history.ts (DB wiki_versions + .snapshots/) during every write operation. Two logging systems: deprecated logger.ts (file-based) alongside history.ts.

4-tier idle processing hierarchy: T1 (5min) lightweight, T2 (10min) enrichment, T3 (15min) lore, T4 (30min) expensive. queueIdleJobs adds extract_lore_comprehensive, wiki_enrich_entity, wiki_generate_rumors, wiki_deepen_page alongside tier jobs.

External consumers of wiki subsystem: retrieval.ts (getWikiContext), entity-resolution.ts (resolveEntityToWikiPage), wiki-handler.ts (8 job types), lore-extraction.ts (comprehensive extraction). All depend on file-io.ts and wiki-root.ts.

Job lifecycle: queued → processing → completed/failed. Auto-retry: failed → queued (if retry_count < max_retries). Stale recovery: processing >5min → failed. Dedup: 30s window. Debounce: 30-60s per type. Retention: 30 days. Exponential backoff: min(base*2^retry, 30s).

Component composition: ChatWindow contains StreamingText and EditHistory. SessionRecapPanel and LoreExtractionTrigger both contain JobProgress. StreamingText and JobProgress both use useRenderLoop. LayerManager contains EraEditor, FactionEditor, CharacterEditor — all use ConfirmationDialog.
Complete authentication flow: login, verify session, logout
Full session lifecycle: create universe, create session, list, view details, subscribe to SSE
